title: NarrativeEntry
description: A single timed macro intelligence update produced by the FORTIFYOS Macro Intel Engine narrator (AI or rule-based).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this entry was generated.

regimeMode.description: Regime mode active at the time of this entry.

confidence.description: Regime confidence at the time of this entry (0.0–1.0).

source.description: Narration source: 'ai' = Anthropic API, 'rule_based' = deterministic fallback, 'rule_based_fallback' = emergency fallback when prompt payload parsing fails.

headline.description: One-sentence summary specific to this checkpoint. No generic phrasing.

dominantStory.description: 2–4 sentence structural narrative explaining the regime mechanism, not just asset prices.

crossAssetConnections.description: Specific cross-asset relationship observations. Each item must reference at least two assets.

whatChangedSinceLastReport.description: Specific deltas vs the prior checkpoint (not vs yesterday close).

operatorPosture.description: Concrete directional stance for the operator. No vague hedging phrases.

watchNext.description: Specific levels, events, or relationships to monitor at the next checkpoint.

confidenceCommentary.description: 1–2 sentences on regime confidence and primary source of uncertainty.

uncertaintyFlags.description: Specific conditions that would invalidate the current regime read.
